bayi.name: Dealer Management
bayi.description: AI + WhatsApp dealer sales portal for Turkish distributors
bayi.value_subtitle: Your assistant upu turns WhatsApp messages from dealers into orders, tracks payment terms and manages your field team. Keep using Logo/Yuki/Exact — we just replace the dealer-facing layer.
bayi.value_1_desc: Dealer types '5 boxes of paint please' — AI extracts product, quantity, price; asks for your approval. 30 seconds from message to order.
bayi.value_2_desc: Three days before due date a friendly nudge, on the day a reminder, after that firmer — all with your approval before reaching the dealer.
bayi.value_3_desc: Regional manager types 'my route' in the morning — AI sorts dealers by due date + location. Voice visit notes become structured data.
bayi.value_4_desc: New discount, new product, seasonal campaign — personalized WA message to all dealers, automatic tracking. Not email blast — 95%+ open rate.
bayi.value_5_desc: Yuki, Exact, SnelStart, Logo NL — whichever you use, we read it. Customer ledger, invoices, payments flow without errors.
bayi.pricing_growth_desc: Distributor with team (up to 100 dealers, field reps incl.)
bayi.pricing_pro_desc: Unlimited dealers + all integrations + priority support
bayi.referral_banner: 🎁 First {count} customers: free setup + 3 months at half price
bayi.refund_banner: 🔒 Not happy within {days} days? Full refund — subscription + setup, no questions asked

marketing.hero_subtitle: Grow your business with AI-powered virtual employees

landing.hero_subtitle: Manage via WhatsApp. No app to download. Your AI-powered team works 24/7.
landing.team_subtitle: Each one supports you in their area of expertise. Send commands via WhatsApp, they work instantly.
landing.how_step1_desc: Start your 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
landing.how_step2_desc: Send your invite code to WhatsApp. Ready in 30 seconds.
landing.how_step3_desc: Your virtual employees are at your service 24/7. Give commands, get instant results.
landing.pricing_subtitle: Try free for 14 days, then choose the plan that suits you
landing.cta_subtitle: Try free for 14 days. No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

legal.privacy_intro: upu (operated by upudev) protects your personal data and complies with GDPR/AVG. This policy describes what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.
legal.privacy_data_b: Account info (name, email, phone), company info (KvK, BTW/VAT, address), dealer and order data, WhatsApp message history (for AI training), and technical logs (IP, browser). AI processing via Anthropic Claude API — messages follow Anthropic's standard data retention.
legal.privacy_use_b: Only to deliver the service: dealer management, order processing, AI suggestions/drafts, anonymous usage analytics. We do not sell to third parties.
legal.privacy_share_b: Only with integrations you select: Yuki/Exact/SnelStart (via Chift), Mollie (payments), PostNL (shipping), Storecove (Peppol e-invoices), Stripe (subscription billing). Each has its own privacy policy.
legal.privacy_rights_b: Under GDPR: access, rectification, erasure, portability, objection. Request via info@upudev.nl — we respond within 30 days. For complaints, contact the Dutch DPA (Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens).
legal.privacy_retention_b: While your account is active. Upon deletion, personal data is erased within 30 days; billing records retained 7 years (legal requirement).
legal.privacy_security_b: Data stored encrypted within the EU on Supabase. All connections TLS 1.2+. WhatsApp messages via Meta's end-to-end encryption.
legal.terms_intro: By using upu Dealer Management (operated by upudev) you agree to the following terms.
legal.terms_service_b: WhatsApp + AI-powered dealer order, collection, field sales, and accounting integration. Three plans (Starter €99 / Growth €249 / Pro €599) — differences on the landing page.
legal.terms_account_b: You are responsible for securing your account and providing accurate information. When inviting employees, you are liable for the permissions granted.
legal.terms_payment_b: Monthly subscription via Stripe. Setup (€749) is optional, splittable into 3 installments; included in Growth and Pro. First 10 customers: free setup + first 3 months at half price.
legal.terms_refund_b: Not satisfied within the first 30 days? Full refund of subscription + setup fee. Email info@upudev.nl or click "Request Refund" in your panel — no questions asked, refunded via Stripe within 2 business days. After 30 days, refund requests are evaluated case by case.
legal.terms_fairuse_b: Per-plan dealer count and monthly WhatsApp message caps are soft — exceeding them does not block service, only triggers an upgrade suggestion. Employee count is a hard limit (Starter 3 / Growth 10 / Pro unlimited).
legal.terms_termination_b: You can close your account at any time. Your data is archived for 30 days, then fully erased.
legal.terms_liability_b: Service provided "as is". Liability for damages from system errors, incorrect AI suggestions, or third-party integration failures is limited to the monthly subscription amount.
legal.terms_jurisdiction_b: These terms are governed by Dutch law. Disputes resolved by Amsterdam courts.
